sections.paragraph:
συνοικέω fut. 3 sg. συνοικήσει Dt 25:5; aor. συνῴκησα LXX; pf. ptc. fem. συνῳκηκυῖα LXX live with τινί someone (since Hipponax [VI b.c.] 20 Diehl3 and Aeschyl.; also Demetr.: 722 Fgm. 2, 2 Jac.) of man and wife (Hdt. et al.; OGI 771, 28; pap, LXX; Jos., Ant. 4, 247; 8, 191; Demetr.: 722 Fgm. 1, 12; cp. Philo, Sacr. Abel. 20) 1 Pt 3:7.—New Docs 3, 85. DELG s.v. οἶκος II C. M-M.

fut. fut. = fut.

  1. sg. = singular

aor. aor. = aorist

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

  1. pf. = perfect

ptc. ptc. = participle

fem. fem. = feminine

Hipponax Hipponax , VI b.c.—List 5

Diehl Diehl , ed., s. AnthLG—List 5

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

Demetr Demetr , III b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Jac. Jac. = Die Fragmente der griechischen Historiker, ed. FJacoby—Lists 5, 6

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 973
